features.description: Master feature key. Off = the whole module is invisible: no admin surfaces, no /me/referral-code endpoint, no invitation composer.
Unlocks free_months, free_sessions, credits, point_award reward types. Small tier is limited to percent_discount + fixed_amount.
Reward both referrer and referred. When off, only single-sided programs are allowed.
Enables the FraudDetector rule surface + the fraud-flag review UI. When off, all referrals proceed regardless of self-IP-match / disposable-email / velocity signals.
Enables max_rewards_per_program budget cap + spike alerts. When off, programs run unbounded until manually paused.
Enables admin force-vest + admin fraud manual-override actions. Enterprise-only.
Enterprise-only. Extends retention 7y -> 10y for financial audit alignment.
Enables admin-generated campaign codes (SUMMER25, TENYEARS, etc.). Small tenants only get user-scoped codes (auto-issued).
Enables the /me/invitations composer surface. When off, users can share their referral code but cannot send in-app invitations.
